init.title: Configure Zoned Heating settings
init.description: Choose device which controls the boiler

controller_idle_state.title: Configure Zoned Heating settings
controller_idle_state.description: If there are TRVs in the same room as the controller thermostat, enable fixed idle state so zoned heating always returns the controller to a predictable mode and setpoint when inactive.

data.use_fixed_idle_controller_state: Use fixed controller idle mode + temperature (recommended with TRVs in controller room)

fixed_idle_controller_state.title: Configure Zoned Heating settings
fixed_idle_controller_state.description: Choose the controller idle mode and setpoint that zoned heating should enforce while inactive.

zones.title: Configure Zoned Heating settings
zones.description: Choose devices which control the zones

max_setpoint.title: Configure Zoned Heating settings
max_setpoint.description: Limit the maximum setpoint which can be requested by the zones

controller_delay_time.title: Configure Zoned Heating settings
controller_delay_time.description: Time it takes for controller entity to reflect changes in setpoint
